---
title: "Coverages Plot"
author: "Sam Hawke"
date: "2026-07-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

# check.names = FALSE preserves column names such as "alpha=0.05"
coverage <- read.csv(
  "../results/coverages/block_simple_coverage.csv",
  check.names = FALSE
)

names(coverage) <- c(
  "",
  "sigma_sq",
  "p",
  "k",
  "rho",
  "alpha_0.2",
  "alpha_0.1",
  "alpha_0.05",
  "alpha_0.01"
)

alpha_columns <- c(
  "alpha_0.2",
  "alpha_0.1",
  "alpha_0.05",
  "alpha_0.01"
)

# Convert from wide to long format without pivot_longer()
coverage_long <- reshape(
  coverage,
  varying = alpha_columns,
  v.names = "observed_coverage",
  timevar = "alpha",
  times = c(0.20, 0.10, 0.05, 0.01),
  direction = "long"
)

coverage_long$nominal_coverage <- 1 - coverage_long$alpha

coverage_long$sigma_sq <- factor(coverage_long$sigma_sq)
coverage_long$p <- factor(coverage_long$p)
coverage_long$k <- factor(coverage_long$k)
coverage_long$rho <- factor(
  coverage_long$rho,
  levels = c(0, 0.3, 0.6),
  labels = c("0", "0.3", "0.6")
)

coverage_long$setting <- interaction(
  coverage_long$sigma_sq,
  coverage_long$p,
  coverage_long$k,
  coverage_long$rho,
  drop = TRUE
)

head(coverage_long)

ggplot(
  coverage_long,
  aes(
    x = nominal_coverage,
    y = observed_coverage,
    group = setting,
    color = sigma_sq,
    linetype = k
  )
) +
  geom_abline(
    intercept = 0,
    slope = 1,
    color = "gray50",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2.4) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(p),
    cols = vars(rho),
    labeller = labeller(
      p = function(x) paste0("p = ", x),
      rho = as_labeller(
        c(
          "0" = "rho == 0",
          "0.3" = "rho == 0.3",
          "0.6" = "rho == 0.6"
        ),
        label_parsed
      )
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.80, 0.90, 0.95, 0.99),
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0.78, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Nominal confidence level",
    y = "Empirical coverage",
    color = expression(sigma^2),
    linetype = "k"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
